name: Compliance Platforms Team
description: Maintains EMBARGO, KYC workflow integrations and compliance platform availability.

name: AML & Sanctions Operations Team
description: Performs alerts review, case investigations, sanctions escalation and regulatory evidence collection.

name: People Operations Team
description: Handles onboarding, role changes, training assignments and HR records quality.

name: Internal Audit Execution Team
description: Executes audit engagements, validates evidence and tracks remediation actions.

name: Payment Processing Team

description: Supports contracts, legal opinions, regulatory interpretation and issue escalation.

name: Internal Accounting Operations Team
description: Executes month-end close, account reconciliation, cost center controls and finance reporting support.

name: Internal IT Service Desk Team
description: Provides level-1/2 support, access ticket triage, device management and incident routing.
